examples.text: W: But walking away from millions of dollars at the height of your career, most people wouldn't be able to resist the lure of such a high salary. When you left the sport, there was speculation that you were having issues with your teammates or even an injury.
examples.explanation: 但当你职业生涯巅峰期放弃数百万美元时，大多数人无法抗拒如此高薪的诱惑。当你离开这项运动时，当时有传言称你与队友关系紧张甚至可能因伤退役。
